Use.title: Text.
Use.subtitle: Editorial type. Inline runs without an outer wrapper.
Use.inside1: Text · the universal styled-run leaf node
Use.inside2: B / I / U / S · classical emphasis runs
Use.inside3: Mark / Span · highlight + arbitrary inline styling
Use.epigraph: Display weights stay at 400. The system trusts size and contrast, not boldness.
Use.meta: Text · B · I · U · S · Mark · Span · A
Use.leftMeta: 1 leaf node · 7 inline run elements · full type ramp

Use.title: Text — single styled run
Use.lede: A leaf node that renders one block of styled text. Carries its own typography attributes plus the universal surface set, so a Text alone can be a heading, a chip, or a button surface.

Foreach.items: [ {"attr":"fontFamily","type":"string","desc":"CSS-style font stack. Falls back to Inter Display."}, {"attr":"fontSize","type":"number","desc":"Pixel size. Display: 32–48; body: 13–14."}, {"attr":"bold","type":"boolean","desc":"Switches to the family's bold face."}, {"attr":"italic","type":"boolean","desc":"Italic face."}, {"attr":"underline","type":"boolean | object","desc":"true or {style:\"sng\",color:\"…\"}."}, {"attr":"strike","type":"boolean","desc":"Strikethrough."}, {"attr":"color","type":"color","desc":"Foreground hex."}, {"attr":"highlight","type":"color","desc":"Background highlight hex (kept as a non-block fill)."}, {"attr":"lineHeight","type":"number","desc":"Multiplier (1.0 = single)."}, {"attr":"textAlign","type":"enum","desc":"left · center · right."}, {"attr":"text","type":"string","desc":"Either an attribute or the element body."} ]

VStack.Text: a Text node owning its own background + padding

Use.title: B · I · U · S · Mark · Span · A — styled inline runs
Use.lede: Inline elements that switch styling mid-paragraph without breaking the text run. They live inside a single Text and behave like CSS spans — no extra layout cost.

Foreach.items: [ {"attr":"<B>","desc":"Bold body run inside a paragraph."}, {"attr":"<I>","desc":"Italic emphasis run."}, {"attr":"<U>","desc":"Underline run (defers to text-decoration)."}, {"attr":"<S>","desc":"Strikethrough run (deletion)."}, {"attr":"<Mark>","desc":"Highlight run with a background fill."}, {"attr":"<Span>","desc":"Carries arbitrary text styling (color, fontFamily, bold)."}, {"attr":"<A href=…>","desc":"Hyperlink run; href is required and renders as link colour."} ]

Use.title: Inline runs share the parent's font
Use.body: Inherited fontFamily, fontSize, lineHeight, and color come from the wrapping Text. Override per-run via the run's own attributes — useful when you want a single bold word inside a 14px body line.

Use.text: Sample · mixed runs in one paragraph

VStack.Text: a single Text containing every inline run type

The signature surface palette resets the rhythm — coral, forest, and surface-dark punctuate the deck. Italic asides stay short, underlined tokens link out, highlighted phrases call attention, and struck-through options mark deprecations. Visit the reference index for the full list.

Slot.name: code
Slot.Text: The signature surface palette resets the rhythm —

Slot.name: render
Slot.Text: The signature surface palette resets the rhythm — coral, forest, and surface-dark punctuate the deck. Italic asides stay short, underlined tokens link out, highlighted phrases call attention, and struck-through options mark deprecations. Visit the reference index for the full list.
